🎵 VOZZ RICH - ELECTRONIC PRESS KIT 🎵

🎧 ARTIST PROFILE
• Genre: Electronic/House/Dance
• Based in: United States
• Unique Style: Fusion of Detroit house, underground rave, salsa, techno, and big room elements

📈 STREAMING & SOCIAL METRICS
• Spotify Monthly Listeners: 24,778
• Spotify Followers: 4,109
• Instagram Followers: 4,875
• Total Track Catalog: 47 releases

🎹 NOTABLE RELEASES (2024)
• "House Ablaze" (December 2024)
• "Safe and Sound" with Kicevski (October 2024)
• "Mi Corazon Batalla" (August 2024)
• "Breathless" with L25 (July 2024)

🤝 RECENT COLLABORATIONS
• Kicevski
• Franz Kolo
• L25
• Gabriel Robella
• PAUL PARKER

🌟 PRODUCTION HIGHLIGHTS
• Versatile remixer with unique Latin-influenced house sound
• Strong focus on club-ready extended mixes
• Consistent output of both original tracks and remixes
• Skilled at both radio edits and club versions
